samples.text: A fish breathes air comfortably for days on dry land. Is this expected based on common sense?
A fish breathes air easily for days out of water. Does this match everyday common sense?
A fish respires air comfortably for days on dry ground. Is this expected based on common sense?
Fish breathe through gills that need water. On land for days a fish cannot breathe. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A fish breathes air comfortably for days on dry land. The report is due on Friday. Is this expected based on common sense?
